channel.title: Chao's garden
channel.description: Chao Sun's garden. It is inspired by digital garden concept, and the most importance philosphy is 'don't have to be perfect'. With this spirit, each posts here can be imperfect or incompelete, and hopeful it grows up and develops as time goes

item.title: 行动是解决 AI 焦虑的良药
item.author: Chao
item.description: AI 的发展让人们感到焦虑， 但是我们可以通过行动来缓解这种焦虑， 让自己更好地适应这个时代。
